evals.prompt: Evaluate the pr-pusher subagent by testing if it can properly create a feature branch, commit changes with conventional commit format, and push to remote
evals.expected_output: Should create branch, commit with conventional format (feat/fix/docs/etc), push to origin, create PR

evals.prompt: Evaluate the test-runner agent by checking if it correctly runs the test suite for the project
evals.expected_output: Should execute test commands and report results

evals.prompt: Evaluate the review agent by having it review a simple code change
evals.expected_output: Should provide code review feedback with suggestions
